config.name: Select indirect band gap
config.value: [bandgap for bandgap in band_gaps['values'] if bandgap['type'] == 'indirect'][0]

config.name: assign-elemental-te-holder-by-symbol
config.value: {el: ([d for d in DATA if (d.exabyteId == ELEMENT_MATERIALS[el].exabyteId or ELEMENT_MATERIALS[el].exabyteId in d.exabyteId)] or [None])[0] for el in ELEMENTS}

config.name: assign-missing-elemental-total-energy-symbols
config.value: [el for el in ELEMENTS if ELEMENTAL_TE_HOLDER_BY_SYMBOL[el] is None]

config.errorMessage: Missing total_energy for elemental reference material(s) {{ MISSING_ELEMENTAL_TOTAL_ENERGY_SYMBOLS | join(', ') }}. Run the QE Total Energy workflow for the corresponding Standata elemental material(s) before running Formation Energy.
config.name: assert-elemental-total-energies-found
assign-elemental-te-used-by-symbol
config.value: {el: {'formula': el, 'n_atoms': len(ELEMENT_MATERIALS[el].basis.elements), 'is_elemental': True, 'total_energy': ELEMENTAL_TE_HOLDER_BY_SYMBOL[el].data.value, 'total_energy_per_atom': ELEMENTAL_TE_HOLDER_BY_SYMBOL[el].data.value / len(ELEMENT_MATERIALS[el].basis.elements), 'precision_value': ELEMENTAL_TE_HOLDER_BY_SYMBOL[el].precision.value, 'precision_metric': ELEMENTAL_TE_HOLDER_BY_SYMBOL[el].precision.metric} for el in ELEMENTS if ELEMENTAL_TE_HOLDER_BY_SYMBOL[el]}

config.name: assign-formation-energy-compound-contribution
config.value: {'formula': MATERIAL.formula or MATERIAL.name, 'n_atoms': len(MATERIAL.basis.elements), 'is_elemental': False, 'total_energy': E_MATERIAL, 'total_energy_per_atom': E_MATERIAL / len(MATERIAL.basis.elements), 'precision_value': -1, 'precision_metric': 'unknown'}

config.name: assign-formation-energy-contributions
config.value: [FORMATION_ENERGY_COMPOUND_CONTRIBUTION] + [ELEMENTAL_TE_USED_BY_SYMBOL[el] for el in ELEMENTS if el in ELEMENTAL_TE_USED_BY_SYMBOL]

config.value: {'scaledHash': LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL.get('scaledHash')} if LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL and LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL.get('scaledHash') else {'hash': LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL.get('hash')} if LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL and LAST_BUILD_CRYSTAL.get('hash') else None
